title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・“覇王”を睨む目

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
At long last, these cleats of the Overlord stand
alongside those of the previous generation's
heroes!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
To the assassin, Doto—she who sharpens her
blades in the shadows—I declare that our swords
will clash at the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, I feel it! Astonishment, envy, and alarm well
from within Doto, the heroes of the old, and all
others.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text: Hehehe... My true test as Overlord begins now!
